programmes.show_description: The Ipcress File is a stylish spy story set in the 1960s amid the highly charged atmosphere of the Cold War.
Judge Rinder rules the courtroom in his hit series, but now the respected barrister with a criminal defence background steps out from behind the bench to take on real cases.
This channel is currently off air.
Members of the local constabulary patrol the town of Ashfordly and the nearby village of Aidensfield, keeping the peace whilst also dealing with local loveable rogues.
As a mysterious force rises over Middleton, Cassie, Abigail and Joy embark on a season-long quest to triumph over the biggest threat their Merriwick magic has ever faced.
From the planets most stunning state of the art structures to its mightiest modern machines, none would have been possible without the pioneering engineers of the past.
In a new social experiment, a group of celebrity pensioners head to India to love under one roof for a summer of discovery.
Jeremy investigates tales of a mysterious shark-octopus hybrid called the Lusca.
Follows the lives of six women in rural Cheshire who are deeply affected by the Second World War and try to cope up with the trauma of being away from their loved ones.
Nick is warned that Stevie Walsh may be heading his way. The man has just been released from prison and has a history of violent crime, including armed robbery.
In a bid to lose weight in ten days, Amber and Roisin try the Dukan lean protein diet and the mono-meal weight-loss regime. The abs and the South Beach diets are also tested.
Alex Polizzi's continues on her quest to turn badly run hotels into profitable ventures.
Cain feels betrayed. Joe is annoyed. Marlon is put out.

A vengeful Maggie pays Megan a visit at her flat, Lou comes to the rescue when Debbie picks a fight, George despairs as Adam and Alya build the case against him, and Bethany confides in Jodie about be
A wedding reception goes off with a bang, when a fishing trawler careers off track. Elsewhere, Adam has a difficult choice to make, and there's a new arrival at the hospital.
When two rich and successful brothers fall under suspicion of murder, Frost's quest for the truth leads to him being suspended from duty while a new lady friend enters his life.
A pawnbroker's in Ashfordly is broken into one night, when Bellamy should have been in the area. The only clue is that a mini van with a dodgy exhaust was heard in the area.
When a UK politician's daughter dies in Australia, a detective sent to observe the investigation clashes with a local police official.
Maggie faces a grilling for assaulting Megan, Todd thinks on his feet when Theo discovers his escape bag, Ken grows concerned at Daniel's bitterness, and Bethany queries Jodie's credentials.
Paddy reaches breaking point. Jacob is determined. Marlon helps his friend.
Based on the book by Matthieu Suc, this tense thriller plunges viewers into the heart of the French secret services as the country faces an unprecedented terrorist campaign.
Harry returns to Manchester, but Kasia is determined to leave. In Europe, Marga and Henriette must each make their escape, while north Africa becomes even more brutal for Rajib.
Dublin After Dark explores the efforts of members of An Garda Siochana to combat growing levels of anti-social behaviours on the streets of the capital. (SL)

Hotel Benidorm will take the viewers not only to one of the meds favourite towns, Benidorm, but also behind the scenes in one of the resort's most popular hotels.
Extreme angler and underwater detective Jeremy Wade goes in search of the real creature behind the enduring legend of the sea serpent.

After finding out about the hospital's staffing problems, Jill offers to cut short her maternity leave and return to work, while Matron notices that Catherine is avoiding Adam.
Frost investigates two domestic cases that come with a terrible cost.
A German-American, arrives in Ashfordly with intentions to shoot a local reclusive land owner, who was responsible for his family being sent to concentration camps during the war.
Amy is trapped and running out of time. Vigil's crew must identify the traitor or risk tragedy.
Maggie's slip of the tongue arouses Ben's suspicions, George nervously awaits the verdict in court, Jodie jumps to Bethany's defence, and Debbie's loved ones are optimistic ahead of her appeal.
Paddy spirals. Marlon has an idea. Marlon makes a discovery.
Retirement looms large on the horizon for Tennison, as her exemplary career heads towards its conclusion, she is paying dearly for 35 years of repressed rage and loneliness
